hero.title1: TODO: Be there for your parents,
hero.subtitle: TODO: MyanCare makes warm, scheduled phone calls to your elderly parents in Myanmar — no smartphone, no internet, just a friendly voice on the phone they already have.
hero.note: TODO: For families working in Japan, Singapore, Thailand and beyond

howItWorks.title: TODO: How it works
howItWorks.step1Text: TODO: Sign up and record a short voice note for your parent, so our first call arrives with your voice.
howItWorks.step2Text: TODO: Our trained caller phones your parent on the schedule you choose — a friendly chat on any GSM phone.
howItWorks.step3Text: TODO: After each call, you receive a wellness update so you always know how Mom and Dad are doing.

pricing.title: TODO: Simple pricing

pricing.feature2: TODO: Your recorded voice note, delivered with care
pricing.feature3: TODO: A wellness update after every call
pricing.feature4: TODO: Works on any GSM phone — no apps, no internet
